coupon.source_phrase_block: This pass admits 2 people at $12 each. Once you have your pass, you will need to reserve your date and time to visit the Peabody Essex Museum through the museum's website (my.pem.org/events). Your library pass will have a promo code to use with your museum reservation to receive the discounted admission rate.
